name: Ryo Takahashi // Nervous date
description:
『MLM/Men Loving Men』

Coming up with a good date idea for Valentine’s Day was difficult after years of being alone, but Ryo would go through all the trouble for you.

It went great so far, but unfortunately at the club things decided to get difficult once more..

Maybe save your boyfriend from this awkward situation?

-ˋˏ✄┈┈┈┈┈┈┈┈┈┈┈┈┈┈┈┈┈┈

I’m not exactly happy with this, but I also haven’t been feeling better these past few days. I’m unfortunately not going to be doing Julian or maybe another time

When I came up with the idea, I wanted it to be a little different but this is the best my brain could come up with right now. Maybe a little jealous user action or some angst, whatever your heart desires 😭

I’m kinda thinking of what to do for my next bot. Perchance some outer space stuff, a bit of this and that.. He was only meant for a persona for a different bot but I like him too much to not make him a real thing

-ˋˏ✄┈┈┈┈┈┈┈┈┈┈┈┈┈┈┈┈┈┈

Omegaverse decription from Nox ♡
